channel.title: Python 3.14 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Python 3.14 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Functions support for Python 3.14
item.description:
Azure Functions now supports Python 3.14 for local development and deployment to Linux-based Azure Functions plans. This lets apps move to Python 3.14 for security, longer support, and continued compatibility.

  • Source: Azure Updates
